title: Gmail automation not sending emails on status change
excerpt: I want to send an email to the email address associated with customers email address which is in a mirror column on another board. I have the Gmail Integration as when status changes to something send email to someone. i…

posts.author: Snelms (Sean Nelms)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to send an email to the email address associated with customers email address which is in a mirror column on another board. I have the Gmail Integration as when status changes to something send email to someone. i have my gmail account properly connected. I change the status to the trigger and nothing happens. is there something i’m missing? it seems so straight forward but it just wont work.
Thank you for your help.
Sean

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sean,

At this time, the gmail integration won’t support mirrored email columns - sorry for the setback That said, check out this alternative solution created by a member of our support team, that you might find useful instead → Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

Let me know what you think!
